2606.14243.title: Decoupled Mixture-of-Experts for Parametric Knowledge Injection
2606.14243.paper_summary: Knowledge injection aims to equip large language models (LLMs) with external, domain-specific, or time-sensitive knowledge. Existing approaches typically face a trade-off between flexibility and integration: retrieval-augmented generation keeps knowledge outside the model but only provides prompt-level augmentation, whereas post-training based methods encode new knowledge into shared parameters but may introduce catastrophic forgetting, knowledge conflict, and costly updates. In this paper, we propose Decoupled Mixture-of-Experts (DMoE), a modular architecture for parametric knowledge injection that decouples both experts and the router from the base model. DMoE converts external knowledge corpora into independently updatable expert modules and uses a lightweight uncertainty-aware router to activate relevant experts only when the base model lacks sufficient knowledge during generation. To support efficient auto-regressive inference, DMoE attaches experts only to the final-layer feed-forward network, preserving KV-cache reuse while enabling parameter-level knowledge augmentation. Experiments on knowledge-intensive benchmarks show that DMoE consistently improves answer quality over retrieval and adapter-based baselines.
2606.14243.paper_summary_zh: 知識注入旨在為大型語言模型（LLMs）提供外部、特定領域或時間敏感的知識。現有的方法通常面臨靈活性和整合之間的權衡：檢索增強生成將知識保持在模型之外，但僅提供提示級別的增強，而基於後訓練的方法則將新知識編碼到共享參數中，但可能引入災難性遺忘、知識衝突和高成本的更新。在本文中，我們提出了解耦混合專家（DMoE），這是一種參數化知識注入的模組化架構，將專家和路由器與基礎模型解耦。DMoE 將外部知識語料庫轉換為可獨立更新的專家模組，並使用輕量級的不確定性感知路由器，僅在基礎模型在生成過程中缺乏足夠知識時啟用相關專家。為了支持高效的自回歸推理，DMoE 僅將專家附加到最終層的前饋網絡，保留 KV 緩存重用，同時實現參數級別的知識增強。在知識密集型基準測試中的實驗顯示，DMoE 在答案質量上始終優於基於檢索和適配器的基準。
2606.14243.author: Baoqing Yue et.al.
2606.14243.authors: Baoqing Yue, Weihang Su, Qingyao Ai, Yichen Tang, Changyue Wang, Jiacheng Kang, Jingtao Zhan, Yiqun Liu
